svg.title: GenAI Vanilla Stack — Architecture
svg.desc: Topologically-ordered architecture diagram of the GenAI Vanilla stack: external clients enter via Kong, the gateway routes to Apps and Agents, which call the LLM Core (LiteLLM → Ollama + cloud) and the Media + Data layers; Ray supplies distributed compute.

g.text: Postgres + pgvector · Auth (GoTrue) · Storage · Realtime · Studio
single source of truth for public.llms model catalog
All edges are runtime / request-path. Init-time bootstrap calls (LiteLLM-init reading public.llms, Ollama-pull warming models) are omitted for clarity.
